steps: Go to https://app.chartmogul.com and log in (or start a free trial)
Click your profile avatar in the top-right corner and select 'View Profile'
Click the 'API keys' tab in your profile page
Give the key a name and select the access level (Read-only or Read & Write)
Click 'Create API Key' — the key is displayed immediately
Copy the API key and store it securely; it is used as the username in HTTP Basic Auth with an empty password

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your ChartMogul API key. Used with HTTP Basic Auth: base64-encode 'api_key:' (note the trailing colon with empty password) and set as the Authorization header with 'Basic ' prefix

notes: 14-day free trial available; no credit card required
ChartMogul uses HTTP Basic Authentication: the API key is the username, password is empty
Create separate API keys per integration; use read-only keys unless write access is needed
Keys can be disabled, regenerated, or deleted from the API Access Manager at Settings & Data > Admin > API Access Manager
API rate limits: 40 requests/second on most plans

test_endpoint.description: Returns your ChartMogul account details including name, currency, and timezone
